assumptions: date-fns library is already available in the project
useStudyPlan.ts hook exists and manages study plan state
engine.ts exists and handles date calculations
StudyPlanPage.tsx exists as the main UI component
review_questions: Is the 7-day window calculation correct for the 07/03/2026 exam case (28/02 - 06/03)?
Does the page correctly show empty state before button click?
Does changing exam date after generation NOT auto-regenerate?
Is there any timezone edge case that could cause off-by-one errors?
complexity_reasoning: Scope: 12 (3-4 files across hook/engine/page), Risk: 10 (core learning feature modification), Novelty: 8 (new behavior patterns), Cross-domain: 6 (frontend + hook logic), Ambiguity: 4 (clear requirements, some impl details), Dependency: 5 (depends on existing files). Total: 45

input_quality.reasoning: Input contains clear ## Required Logic, ## UI Behavior, ## Technical Touchpoints, and ## Acceptance Criteria sections. Requirements are well-specified with exact file names and method signatures.
